entry.title: New IDC 70RSAT20D00000001 awarded to THE MITRE CORPORATION for the amount of $25,000

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: OFF OF THE USCTY FOR SCIENCE TECH

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Any TOs issued prior to expiration of the Contract Ordering Period (COP) shall not extend beyond twelve (12) months after expiration of the COP.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: FIVE YEAR IDIQ FOR THE DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY SYSTEMS ENGINEERING AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE (HSSEDI).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- OTHER RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT NANOTECHNOLOGY AND BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
